DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_CUSTOMER]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_CUSTOMER]
( 
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CustomerName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CustomerClass] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CustomerClassDescription] [nvarchar](100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
